Kadir Has University

Campus Life Office

The Campus Life Office, with its units and expert staff, aims to enrich our students' university life, make it enjoyable, and contribute to their social and cultural development through conferences, panels, talks, training sessions, concerts, etc., organized with student clubs within the university. Additionally, we aim to promote a healthier lifestyle through sports activities.

Choose and apply to the student club you want to join to enrich your university life!

Activism Club

We work to raise awareness and ensure active participation in social issues.

Join Club

We work to preserve and spread Atatürk's principles and reforms.
